title: Senior AI Engineer – Generative AI and Knowledge Systems
company_focus:
Optics and optoelectronics across medical, research, and
industrial applications
description:
ZEISS in India

ZEISS in India is headquartered in Bengaluru and present in
the fields of Industrial Quality Solutions, Research
Microscopy Solutions, Medical Technology, Vision Care and
Sports & Cine Optics.

ZEISS India has 3 production facilities, R&D center, Global
IT services and about 40 Sales & Service offices in almost
all Tier I and Tier II cities in India. With 2200+ employees
and continued investments over 25 years in India, ZEISS’
success story in India is continuing at a rapid pace.

Further information at ZEISS India.

We are seeking a highly skilled Senior AI Engineer with
expertise in generative AI, large language models (LLMs),
natural language processing (NLP), and data engineering. In
this role, you will design and implement cutting-edge AI
systems, leveraging frameworks like LangGraph, Retrieval-
Augmented Generation (RAG), and graph-based techniques to
create innovative knowledge systems. This is an exciting
opportunity to work on challenging problems, collaborate
with cross-functional teams, and shape the future of AI-
driven solutions.

Technical Expertise

- Strong experience with LangGraph or similar frameworks for
  LLM-based applications.
- Proficiency in prompt engineering and fine-tuning LLMs.
- Hands-on experience with RAG techniques and/or graph-based
  knowledge systems.
- Advanced knowledge of NLP techniques, including text
  preprocessing, embeddings, and transformer-based models.
- Advanced programming skills in Python and familiarity with
  AI/ML libraries (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face).
- Proficiency with REST API development with pythong (Flask,
  Django, FastAPI)

Data Engineering

- Proven ability to design and implement scalable data
  pipelines.
- Experience with data preprocessing, ETL workflows, and
  working with structured/unstructured data.

AI Workflow Design

- Deep understanding of AI agent workflows and multi-agent
  systems.
- Familiarity with reinforcement learning, reasoning systems,
  or similar AI paradigms.

Problem-Solving and Innovation

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a focus on
  pragmatic, impactful solutions.
- Ability to experiment with and implement novel AI
  techniques.

Collaboration and Communication

- Excellent communication skills to explain complex technical
  concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
- Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience with knowledge graphs, semantic search, or
  ontology-based systems.
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP) and
  MLOps tools.
- Knowledge of vector databases (e.g., Pinecone, pg_vector, or
  Milvus).
- Prior experience in building production-grade AI systems.
- Advanced understanding of transformer-based NLP models like
  BERT, GPT, or T5.

Your ZEISS Recruiting Team:

Saptarshi Chowdhury
responsibilities: Design and implement cutting-edge generative AI systems using frameworks like LangGraph and RAG
Develop and fine-tune large language models (LLMs) for various applications
Build graph-based knowledge systems and implement semantic search solutions
Design and implement scalable data pipelines and ETL workflows
Create AI agent workflows and multi-agent systems
Develop production-grade AI systems with REST APIs using Python frameworks
Experiment with and implement novel AI techniques and transformer-based NLP models
Collaborate with cross-functional teams and communicate technical concepts to stakeholders
use_cases: Knowledge systems and graph-based information retrieval
Enterprise search and semantic search solutions
Natural language processing and text analytics
Intelligent document processing and information extraction
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building and implementing GenAI
systems using LangGraph, RAG, and LLM fine-tuning. The
engineer will design AI agent workflows and multi-agent
systems, which is hands-on AI/ML development work.
